title: Accelera Partners With Tyczka Hydrogen GmbH to Supply 5MW Electrolyzer System for Green Hydrogen Production in Germany
content:
Accelera is partnering with Tyczka Hydrogen GmbH to deploy a 5-megawatt (MW) proton exchange membrane (PEM) electrolyzer system at the Port of Schweinfurt in Bavaria, Germany. Powered by renewable solar and wind energy, the system will produce up to 2.2 tons of green hydrogen daily, supporting decarbonization across mobility, industrial, and research sectors in central Germany.

The project will utilize two Accelera HyLYZERÂ® 500 electrolyzers, offering advanced technology and high efficiency. Situated at Schweinfurt, a strategic logistics hub with access to industrial infrastructure and the SÃ¼dLink DC grid, the electrolyzer benefits from reliable renewable energy sources. The initiative is expected to reduce carbon dioxide emissions by over 6,000 tons annually, equivalent to removing about 1,400 passenger vehicles from circulation.

Backed by a â‚¬5 million grant from the Bavarian Ministry of Economic Affairs, the project demonstrates strong government support for hydrogen infrastructure. Accelera, a global leader in PEM electrolysis with more than 600 deployed units, aims to advance the regional hydrogen value chain, accelerating Europeâ€™s transition to zero-emissions transportation and industry while fostering a sustainable green hydrogen economy.
author: Analysts Account
